goal: Ship 404 page, CookieNotice, and OG meta — all three launch-readiness gaps

steps.name: CookieNotice.vue component
steps.description: Build CookieNotice.vue — first-visit dismissible banner, localStorage persistence, links to /privacy. Mount in app.vue.
steps.scenario_name: cookie notice is visible on first visit
acceptance_criteria: CookieNotice.vue renders on first visit with data-testid='cookie-notice'
Dismiss sets localStorage flag, hides notice
Dismissed state persists across navigation and reload

steps.name: Strip iubenda from CSP
steps.description: Remove iubenda domains from Content-Security-Policy in public/_headers. Update architecture brief note.
steps.scenario_name: response headers do not contain iubenda domains in CSP
acceptance_criteria: public/_headers CSP does not contain iubenda.com or cdn.iubenda.com
CSP remains valid (script-src, style-src, img-src, connect-src, frame-src updated)

steps.name: Custom error.vue — 404 page
steps.description: Create error.vue at project root. Must include SiteHeader and SiteFooter (bypasses app.vue). Shows heading + homepage link. Configure Netlify 404 redirect.
steps.scenario_name: visiting a non-existent path shows a branded error page
acceptance_criteria: error.vue renders with site navigation visible

steps.name: 404 page full scenario set
steps.description: Enable and verify remaining 404-page.spec.ts scenarios: header/footer, homepage link navigation, document title, deep path.
steps.scenario_name: 404 page renders with site header and footer
acceptance_criteria: Page title is 'Page not found | Daedalus Coaching'

steps.name: OG meta tags in nuxt.config.ts
steps.description: Extend app.head.meta in nuxt.config.ts with og:image, og:image:width, og:image:height, twitter:image. Image path: /images/og-card.png. Note: og-card.png asset is an owner action — wired config ships first.
steps.scenario_name: homepage head contains an og:image meta tag
acceptance_criteria: og:image meta tag present on homepage pointing to /images/og-card.png
WS-03 passes (skipped until asset exists — config step ships independently)
steps.notes: og-card.png asset creation is an owner action. This step wires the config. WS-03 scenario remains skipped until the image asset is created.
